'''''Cretacian''''' was [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa's]] [[Gallofree Yards, Inc./Legends|Gallofree]] [[Transport/Legends|transport]] [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|ship]] in the early days of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

[[File:Cretacian_crashed.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The ''Cretacian'' crashed on Krant.]]

While on a mission to [[Krant]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] in order to meet [[Utric Sandov]], the ship had a [[Skirmish in the Krant system|fight]] with [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] and crashed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Organa, the [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and eight [[Rebel trooper/Legends|Rebel troopers]] survived the crash.

==Behind the scenes==
''Cretacian'' appears in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}}
